function.name: get_screen_deep
function.description: Like get_screen, but also includes [hidden-area] @(x,y) entries for visible screen regions whose UI nodes are hidden from the accessibility tree (e.g. Compose buttons with importantForAccessibility=NO_HIDE_DESCENDANTS). Only call this when get_screen does not show an expected button and you are stuck. The output is noisier than get_screen — prefer get_screen for normal navigation.
